text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Whew! I don't know what it is, buttraining felt extra good today!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I bet it's because I get really fired up<n>when I'm
running with you!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Hehe. Me too, Kita. My legs are worn<n>out!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I know what'll help! Let me give you<n>a
massage!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
My mom used to give me them all the<n>time, so
I've learned a few tricks!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Thanks, Kita. That would be great.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: But once we're done, I want you to teachme how to give massages.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I know your legs must be tired too. We<n>did the
same run, after all.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Aw, Dia... Hehe, sure. I'll teach you later!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
We'll run together, give each other<n>massages, and
run again! No goal's too<n>far, so long as we're
together!
